title: Meetings calendar
subtitle: Choose a month, inspect a day and book your place after your application is approved.

filters.title: Filters
filters.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# result after filtering} other {# results after filtering}}
filters.emptyTitle: No dates match the selected filters.
filters.emptyDescription: Clear some filters or switch to another month.

mine.calendarAria: You have an active registration on this day

myRegistrations.title: My registrations
myRegistrations.description: {count, plural, one {You have # active registration for an upcoming meeting.} other {You have # active registrations for upcoming meetings.}}
myRegistrations.emptyTitle: You do not have any active registrations yet.
myRegistrations.emptyDescription: This view will show your upcoming meetings together with the available cancellation action.

calendar.dayHint: Select a day in the calendar to inspect meetings and available actions.
calendar.emptyDayAnnouncement: {date}. There are no meetings on this day.
calendar.emptyMonthTitle: There are no meetings in this month.
calendar.emptyMonthDescription: Switch to the previous or next month to look for available dates.
calendar.emptyDayDescription: Choose another day marked with a commission badge or switch to a different month.

list.dayHint: This view shows only days with actual meetings so the user can move straight to booking or cancellation.
list.emptyTitle: There are no meetings in this month.
list.emptyDescription: Switch to another month or come back later when commissions publish new dates.

slots.notAvailableNow: Booking for this slot is currently unavailable.

dayOnly.description: This meeting uses day-only mode (without selecting a specific hour).
dayOnly.bookedByYou: You already have an active registration for this day.
dayOnly.notAvailableNow: Booking for this date is currently unavailable.

details.loading: Loading details for the selected day...
details.loadFailed: Failed to load details for this day.
details.showDayAria: Show {count, plural, one {# meeting} other {# meetings}} for {date}
details.emptyTitle: Meetings for this day are no longer available.
details.emptyDescription: Refresh the month view or choose another day.
details.filteredEmptyTitle: No meetings on this day match the current filters.
details.filteredEmptyDescription: Change the filters or choose another day.

blocked.NOT_APPROVED_APPLICATION: Booking is available only after your application is accepted by the commission.
blocked.NO_MATCHING_APPROVED_APPLICATION: This meeting is available only for the commission type matching your approved application.
blocked.MEETING_NOT_OPEN: This meeting is currently not open for registration.
blocked.ALREADY_REGISTERED: You already have an active registration for this meeting.
blocked.NO_FREE_SLOTS: No free slots are available for this meeting.

errors.authRequired: You must be signed in to view meetings.
errors.forbidden: Your role is not allowed to access this section.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load meetings. Please try again later.
errors.slotAlreadyBooked: This slot has just been booked by someone else.
errors.alreadyRegistered: You already have an active registration for this meeting.
errors.bookingNotAllowedStatus: Booking is available only after your application is accepted by the commission.
errors.bookingNotAllowedApplicationType: This meeting is available only for the commission matching your approved application type.
errors.cancellationNotAllowedStatus: This meeting is no longer open, so cancellation is not available.
errors.cancellationDeadlinePassed: Cancellation is available only until the day before the meeting date.
errors.cancellationNotFound: No active registration was found to cancel.
errors.cancellationGeneric: An error occurred while cancelling registration.
